omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may share your information with third party advertising companies to serve advertisements regarding goods and services that may be of interest to you when you access and use the DAZN Service and other websites, apps or online services, based on information relating to your access to and use of the DAZN Service and other websites, apps or online services on any of your devices, as well as on information received from third parties. To do so, these companies may place or recognise a unique cookie on your browser (including through use of pixel tags). They may also use these technologies, along with information they collect about your online use, to recognise you across the devices you use, such as a mobile phone and a laptop.

We may share your information with third party advertising companies to serve advertisements regarding goods and services that may be of interest to you when you access and use the DAZN Service and other websites, apps or online services, based on information relating to your access to and use of the DAZN Service and other websites, apps or online services on any of your devices, as well as on information received from third parties. To do so, these companies may place or recognise a unique cookie on your browser (including through use of pixel tags). They may also use these technologies, along with information they collect about your online use, to recognise you across the devices you use, such as a mobile phone and a laptop.

We may share your personal data with: ... (c) third parties for marketing purposes, where we have your consent to do so in accordance with applicable law (for example, if you opt-in to receiving marketing communications from third parties). These third parties may include (i) our commercial partners, being any third party with whom we have a commercial relationship, such as our content licensors (e.g. sports rights holders), distribution partners, and promotional partners; and (ii) our media partners, being any third party that is a media agency, advertising network, or other media services partner;
